isi.lyrics:
Lyric LEE DO (ONEUS) - Sun goes down (Feat. YongYong)

Romanization

I don't know why I turned around
I don't know why every day
I prayed, may everything be round
I don't know why the Sun Goes Down

kkeuteopsi makhin gulleui gieok soge taeeona
haneopsi teojin buni eogulhaeseo kkaeeona
tto ppigeokdaen keiseu
bigeophage uneul bireonne
nae ganeun gireul ireobeorilkka duryeoun maeume
tto wae jiok gateun gasibateseo
Go away bareul tteeonae wiheomhae
I don't care ttokbaro bwa
heulleoganeun daero heulleoga
Sun Goes Down

nuneul gamneunda hancham donganeul
I'm betting on you
Betting on you
When the Sun Goes Down, I can find me
Tell me about the town with the heartbeat
I'm victorious, I can get mind
When the Sun Goes Down
I will find me

I don't know why I turned around
I don't know why every day
I prayed, may everything be round
I don't know why the Sun Goes Down
I could be a chance
It could be a change
I can do anything because it should be me
I prayed, may everything be round
I don't know why the Sun Goes Down

jageun nal jibeosamkineun
maeil bam Sun Goes Down yeogin
naneun bol jul mollatji
gonghwang gateun kkamansaek bami
neoneun moreul geoya
banjjagineun cheok sok bimil
Errthing is wrong but I don't
dwireul boni imi nopi
wie tteobeoryeosseo bung
yeogin neomuneomu nopa this hell

taeyang gateun seupoteuraiteu
bitnaneun mangkeum bulta
nega wonhaneun geum
geureoge mugeoun geoya

nuneul gamneunda hancham donganeul
I'm betting on you
betting on you
When the Sun Goes Down, I can find me
Tell me about the town with the heartbeat
I'm victorious, I can get mind
When the Sun Goes Down
I will find me

I don't know why I turned around

I prayed may everything be round
I don't know why the Sun Goes Down
I could be a chance
It could be a change
I can do anything because it should be me
I prayed, may everything be round
I don't know why the Sun Goes Down

I don't know why I turned around and
What I want to do every day
I prayed may everything be round
I don't know why the Sun Goes Down

내 가는 길을 잃어버릴까 두려운 마음에

I can do anything because it should be me

작은 날 집어삼키는

나는 볼 줄 몰랐지
공황 같은 까만색 밤이
너는 모를 거야
반짝이는 척 속 비밀
Errthing is wrong but I don't
뒤를 보니 이미 높이
위에 떠버렸어 붕
여긴 너무너무 높아 this hell
내겐 지옥 같은 노을은 노래엔 아름다운 소재

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Seo Ho (ONEUS) - Hatchling

Romanization

My world's in the coffin
eodupgo seuphan hell
Here is my home
sabangi makhin yeogin
deouk keojineun momjip gamdang mot hae
I wanna go saeroun jeo segyero
natseon gose daehan duryeoum I can overcome
Open the door
yonggireul gajigo du ballo georeo my way

iksukhame sogasseo maeil
chilheuk gatdeon setting
nae uijiro I will change
Wake up nuneul tteo hurry up tteonallae
naega geuryeotdeon geugoseuro

cheot bareul ditgo ireoseo
Like a Hatchling
dalbit arae pyeolchyeojin gwangyareul neukkyeo
deo gipeunsumeul masyeobwa
Like a Hatchling
cheoeum gajyeobon jayureul mankkikhamyeo chumchwo
I break a shell for Hatchling

For Hatchling
For Hatchling
For Hatchling
I break a shell for Hatchling

sseulmoeopdeon nae du nalgae
pyeolchyeo nara haneul dage
dugeunggeorine
bitgwa hwanhui gadeuk cha nae ane
Finally chajasseo naui ppuri
simeul ttange ppeodeo julgi
kkotgwa yeolmaeneun my legacy
Hey! if you can't see your way
naksimhaji malgo find another way
boineun geotdeuri jeombuneun anil geoya
Let's wait for tomorrow's sun together

iksukhame sogasseo maeil
chilheuk gatdeon setting
nae uijiro I will change
Wake up nuneul tteo hurry up tteonallae
naega geuryeotdeon geugoseuro

cheot bareul ditgo ireoseo
Like a Hatchling
dalbit arae pyeolchyeojin gwangyareul neukkyeo
deo gipeunsumeul masyeobwa
Like a Hatchling
cheoeum gajyeobon jayureul mankkikhamyeo chumchwo
I break a shell for Hatchling

jogeuman al wiui gyunyeol
geu teum sairo boyeo
han julgi bichi got my hope
nae duryeoum da break it all
nae ape ssain jangaemul
bujeong seokkin siseondeul
musihae beoryeo for my life
I break a shell for Hatchling

For Hatchling
For Hatchling
For Hatchling
I break a shell for Hatchling
For Hatchling
For Hatchling
For Hatchling
I break a shell for Hatchling

Hangeul

My world's in the coffin
어둡고 습한 hell
Here is my home
사방이 막힌 여긴
더욱 커지는 몸집 감당 못 해
I wanna go 새로운 저 세계로
낯선 곳에 대한 두려움 I can overcome
Open the door
용기를 가지고 두 발로 걸어 my way

익숙함에 속았어 매일
칠흑 같던 setting
내 의지로 I will change
Wake up 눈을 떠 hurry up 떠날래
내가 그렸던 그곳으로

첫 발을 딛고 일어서
Like a Hatchling
달빛 아래 펼쳐진 광야를 느껴
더 깊은숨을 마셔봐
Like a Hatchling
처음 가져본 자유를 만끽하며 춤춰
I break a shell for Hatchling

For Hatchling
For Hatchling
For Hatchling
I break a shell for Hatchling

쓸모없던 내 두 날개
펼쳐 날아 하늘 닿게
두근거리네
빛과 환희 가득 차 내 안에
Finally 찾았어 나의 뿌리
심을 땅에 뻗어 줄기
꽃과 열매는 my legacy
Hey! if you can't see your way
낙심하지 말고 find another way
보이는 것들이 전부는 아닐 거야
Let's wait for tomorrow's sun together

익숙함에 속았어 매일
칠흑 같던 setting
내 의지로 I will change
Wake up 눈을 떠 hurry up 떠날래
내가 그렸던 그곳으로

첫 발을 딛고 일어서
Like a Hatchling
달빛 아래 펼쳐진 광야를 느껴
더 깊은숨을 마셔봐
Like a Hatchling
처음 가져본 자유를 만끽하며 춤춰
I break a shell for Hatchling

조그만 알 위의 균열
그 틈 사이로 보여
한 줄기 빛이 곧 my hope
내 두려움 다 break it all
내 앞에 쌓인 장애물
부정 섞인 시선들
무시해 버려 for my life
I break a shell for Hatchling

For Hatchling
For Hatchling
For Hatchling
I break a shell for Hatchling
For Hatchling
For Hatchling
For Hatchling
